source_quote: Body weight increased by 3.8 +/- 2.6 kg in the EAAs group (P = 0.0002) and -0.1 +/- 1.1 kg in the C group (P = 0.81).

outcome: Difference in mean change in adherence
source_quote: Interventional group MGL score improvement 2.1+/-0.4, Control group improvement 0.22+/-0.2, paired t test p=0.017 for interventional group
Interventional group IOP improvement 5.7+/-0.07 mmHg (p=0.001), Control group improvement 1.4+/-0.4 mmHg; endpoint IOP: interventional 16.1+/-9.4, control 20.0+/-8.4

outcome: Difference in mean change in adherence
source_quote: 12-month post-index: Cohort C mean PDC 0.54 (SD 0.29, n=453), Cohort A mean PDC 0.54 (SD 0.30, n=502), P=0.921 across cohorts. No statistically significant between-cohort differences in PDC and adherence were observed.

outcome: Proportion of participants who were adherent
source_quote: 12-month post-index adherence (PDC>=0.80): Cohort C 108/453 (23.8%), Cohort A 128/502 (25.5%), P=0.773
